description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and upload to PyPI that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build_wheels to build wheels on ubuntu-18.04 for Python 3.8 using cibuildwheel, build_sdist to build a source distribution on ubuntu-latest for Python 3.8, and upload_pypi to upload the artifacts to PyPI when a tag starting with v is pushed.
